abilities.name: 짓궂은마음
abilities.description: 변화 기술을 먼저 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.
To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.
